## Type of Change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] 📚 Documentation update
- [ ] ♻️ Refactor (no behavior change)
- [ ] 🎨 Style / UI improvement
- [ ] ⚡ Performance improvement
- [ ] 🔒 Security fix
- [ ] 🧪 Test update

## Testing Checklist

- [ ] All existing Jest tests pass (`cd apps/server && pnpm test`)
- [ ] TypeScript compiles without errors (`cd apps/client && pnpm exec tsc --noEmit`)
- [ ] ESLint passes without errors or warnings (`pnpm lint`)
- [ ] New functionality has been tested manually
- [ ] Relevant unit/E2E tests have been added or updated
